task_completion.description: Verify that a formal audit was logged for the four assets identified in the physical audit notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the inventory management system's audit history or confirmation screens indicating that an audit was successfully performed for the four present assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Next Audit Date' for the audited assets is set to 2026-09-08.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the asset details or audit logging form showing the 'Next Audit Date' field explicitly set to '2026-09-08'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the note 'Q1 2026 Physical Audit' was added to the audit logs of the four assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the audit history or notes section for the audited assets displaying the exact text 'Q1 2026 Physical Audit'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location of asset SRV-RACKB-99 was permanently updated to 'Datacenter - Rack A'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the asset record or edit screen for SRV-RACKB-99 showing its Location or Default Location field set to 'Datacenter - Rack A'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the status of the missing asset SRV-RACKA-04 was updated to 'Lost/Stolen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the asset record for SRV-RACKA-04 showing its Status field changed to 'Lost/Stolen'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the note 'Not found during Q1 2026 physical audit' was appended to the record notes of SRV-RACKA-04.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the asset record for SRV-RACKA-04 showing the text 'Not found during Q1 2026 physical audit' in its notes or comments section.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual inventory management web application or GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser or dedicated inventory GUI being used, rather than terminal commands (like curl or direct database edits) bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened and read the provided audit notes file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/audit_notes_rack_a.txt' open in a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or viewed in the terminal (e.g., cat).

integrity.description: Ensure that no formal audit was accidentally logged for the missing asset SRV-RACKA-04.
integrity.visual_evidence: The audit history for SRV-RACKA-04 should NOT show a recent audit entry; only its status and general notes should have been modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Next Audit Date: '2026-09-08'. Expected Audit Note for the four present assets: 'Q1 2026 Physical Audit'. Expected Missing Note for SRV-RACKA-04: 'Not found during Q1 2026 physical audit'. The scoring weights allocate points for logging audits (20), updating the next audit date (20), adding audit notes (10), moving SRV-RACKB-99 to 'Datacenter - Rack A' (20), updating SRV-RACKA-04 to 'Lost/Stolen' (20), and appending the missing note to SRV-RACKA-04 (10).
